step_rationale: GPVI signaling kinase; MI pathway hub; mediates platelet activation and adhesion-molecule signaling.
mechanism: FYN amplifies platelet activation via GPVI signaling and supports platelet-leukocyte crosstalk, driving thrombotic occlusion.

references.title: Bioinformatics analysis of key genes and signaling pathways associated with myocardial infarction following telomerase activation.
Plant-based Food Cyanidin-3-Glucoside Modulates Human Platelet Glycoprotein VI Signaling and Inhibits Platelet Activation and Thrombus Formation.
